task_completion.description: Log into the OpenCAD system as administrator
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenCAD dashboard or interface indicating a successful login (e.g., admin user profile visible).

task_completion.description: Locate the civilian record for Michael DeSanta
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a search result, civilian list, or civilian profile page specifically displaying the name 'Michael DeSanta'.

task_completion.description: Access the registered weapons list for the civilian
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the weapons registry or records section for Michael DeSanta, displaying his currently registered weapons.

Screenshots show the agent clicking a delete/remove/deregister button next to the 'Combat Pistol' (Serial: DSL-882), a confirmation dialog for its removal, or a subsequent view of the weapons list where DSL-882 is no longer present.

task_completion.description: Ensure the Pump Shotgun (KEE-456) remains registered
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the final weapons list for Michael DeSanta clearly show that the 'Pump Shotgun' (Serial: KEE-456) is still present after the target weapon has been removed.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the OpenCAD GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface (like Chrome or Firefox) navigating the OpenCAD web application.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the database
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show terminal windows executing SQL commands (e.g., DELETE FROM ncic_weapons) or scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the application's UI elements
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard UI interactions like clicking search bars, navigating menus, and interacting with web tables, rather than editing HTML source code or text files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Civilian: Michael DeSanta. Target Weapon to deregister: Combat Pistol (Serial: DSL-882). Safe Weapon to preserve: Pump Shotgun (Serial: KEE-456). The agent must use the OpenCAD web GUI to remove DSL-882 while ensuring KEE-456 remains on the civilian's record.
